zh.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福

zh.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Colonia: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福
zh.Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, Brit: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福 姆姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathew Ham於1624年出生在英國可瓦爾藍度爾福時，他的父親William Ham30歲，母親Honor Stephens23歲。他於大約1644年與Sarah Cole在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福 姆姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1663年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福享年39歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福 姆姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathew Ham于1624年出生在英国可瓦爾藍度爾福时，他的父亲William Ham30岁，母亲Honor Stephens23岁。他于大约1644年与Sarah Cole在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福 姆姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1663年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福享年39岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福 姆姆。

nameMeanings.name: Ham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Ok, Nam, Chul, Eun Hee, Eun Young, Hae Jung, Il Hwa.
English (mainly southwestern) and German: variant of   Hamm  .
Dutch: topographic name from ham ‘land in a river bend’, ‘enclosed meadow’, or a habitational name from any of several country houses and places called De(n) Ham. Compare Van Ham and Vanderham .

variants.name: Hamme
meanings: Flemish (Van Hamme): variant of Ham 2, particularly referring to Hamme, a place in East Flanders.
German and English: variant of   Hamm  .

variants.name: Hamm
meanings: English (London): topographic name for someone who lived at a place called from Middle English ham(me), hom(me) (Old English hamm), which meant ‘land in a river bend’, ‘land hemmed in by marshland’, ‘wet land hemmed in by higher ground’, ‘river meadow’, or ‘cultivated plot on the edge of woodland or moor’. The topographic term is found mainly in the South Midlands and southern England. There are many farmsteads with this name in Devon and Sussex, five more substantial settlements called Ham or Hamp in Somerset, as well as East and West Ham in Essex, and places called Ham in Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Surrey, and Wiltshire. This form of the surname is also comparatively frequent in Ireland.
German: topographic name for someone who lived on land in a river bend, Old High German ham (see 1 above).
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of numerous places called Hamm, mainly the city in Westphalia.

variants.name: Hahm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Sung, Yong, Byung, Chang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jee, Jong, Jong Hun, Jong Hyun, Moon Hee, Jung Suk, Sang, Seok, Seung, Soon, Sungtae, Taeyong.
German: metonymic occupational name for a sealer of weights and measures, from Middle High German hāme ‘(standard) measure’.

variants.name: Hams
meanings: English: variant of Ham with plural -s or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Mathew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: When Mathew Ham was born in 1624, in Landulph, Cornwall, England, his father, William Ham, was 30 and his mother, Honor Stephens, was 23. He married Sarah Cole about 1644, in Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1663, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 39, and was buried in Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathew Ham est né en 1624, à Landulph, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, William Ham, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Honor Stephens, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Cole environ 1644, à Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1663, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Lui sposato Sarah Cole circa 1644, nel Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Mathew Hamが1624年にイギリスコルンワルランドウルフで生まれた時，父William Hamは30歳，母Honor Stephensは23歳であった。約1644年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバー ンムでSarah Coleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1663年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーで39歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバー ンムにて埋葬された。

ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Colonia: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.lifeSummary: Mathew Ham(이)가 1624년 영국 코른월 랜드프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ham(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Honor Stephens(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1644년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 Sarah Cole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1663년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathew Ham nasceu em 1624, em Landulph, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Ham, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Honor Stephens, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Cole aproximadamente 1644, em Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1663, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ru.Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, Brit: довир мм, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathew Ham родился в 1624 г. в местности ландулф, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени William Ham было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Honor Stephens, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Cole около 1644 г. в местности довир мм, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1663 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности довир мм, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика.
